case_title: CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR VS. ANNA WALKER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,451.00 FILED BY CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, ANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANNA WALKER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-25-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER / TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH. DEFENDANT ANNA WALKER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED BOTH PARTIES HAVE WORKED OUT AN AGREEMENT AND WOULD LIKE A PROGRESS REPORT TO ENSURE PAYMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING, THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $117.50 SERVED JUL-17-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, ANNA
